creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 152890
svn diff that reflects the changes

I use pgworksheet, and noticed the WWW link was no
longer any good. As it appears that it's no longer
maintained upstream. I thought I'd like to keep it
current with the ports it works with - esp; the up
coming python3.
So this is a request for MAINTAINER.
Files Affected:

Makefile adds MAINTAINED LICENSE

pkg-descr - changes WWW

That's pretty much it, for now.

Next version will add the support of lang/python3.

Please find the svn diff, and a session log against
these changes, attached.

Thanks!
